mapper.sql: select id, biz_code, biz_name, storage_mode, table_name, pk_field, order_no_field, order_no_prefix, status_field, workflow_enabled, process_key, fulfillment_enabled, menu_parent_path, submit_validators, status, config_status, published_version, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from lc_biz_object
mapper.insert: insert into lc_biz_object( biz_code, biz_name, storage_mode, table_name, pk_field, order_no_field, order_no_prefix, status_field, workflow_enabled, process_key, fulfillment_enabled, menu_parent_path, submit_validators, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{bizCode}, #{bizName}, #{storageMode}, #{tableName}, #{pkField}, #{orderNoField}, #{orderNoPrefix}, #{statusField}, #{workflowEnabled}, #{processKey}, #{fulfillmentEnabled}, #{menuParentPath}, #{submitValidators}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update lc_biz_object set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where id in
#{id}
